infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Jet Lag App uses your location during live rounds so teammates can track the active player on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Jet Lag App uses your location in the background during live rounds to keep the game map updated while you move.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Jet Lag App uses your location in the background during live rounds to keep the game map updated while you move.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Jet Lag App uses the camera to capture match evidence and photo answers.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Jet Lag App uses your photo library so you can attach evidence and answer photos from your device.
